 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4","title":"Memory: operational workflow (cm playbook + outcomes)","description":"# Goal
Define how we actually *use* cass-memory day-to-day in this repo:
- how the playbook is seeded / curated
- when to run `cm context` and what to inject
- how to record outcomes (`cm outcome ...`)
- how to avoid memory pollution and over-conditioning

---

# Acceptance
- Operators have a concrete checklist for using cm in a session.
- We have a plan for seeding initial rules without vendor APIs.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:07:45.386313425-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T02:33:33.423232575-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T02:33:33.423232575-05:00","close_reason":"Completed runbook: cm categories + context injection + feedback marking workflow","labels":["cass","memory"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:07:45.416664938-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4.1","title":"Seed initial cm playbook categories for Brenner Loop","description":"# Goal
Define an initial taxonomy of cm playbook categories that match Brenner Bot workflows.

Suggested categories:
- protocol-kernel
- prompt-hygiene
- evidence-per-week
- thread-operations
- artifact-compilation
- safety-and-gating

# Acceptance
- A human can add the first handful of rules without guesswork.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:07:57.982605612-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T02:19:40.058033156-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T02:19:40.058033156-05:00","close_reason":"Added recommended cm playbook categories + examples to cockpit runbook","labels":["cm","design","memory"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:07:58.011282222-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"brenner_bot-dko","title":"Task: Fix critical mobile layout issues","description":"Fix P0/P1 issues identified in the mobile audit.

## Purpose

Address blocking issues before polish work. These are problems that make the app feel broken.

## Typical P0/P1 Issues

- Horizontal overflow (content wider than viewport)
- Touch targets below 44px minimum
- Critical text unreadable
- Navigation broken or unusable
- Safe area violations causing content to be hidden

## Approach

1. Work through issues in priority order
2. Fix one issue at a time
3. Re-screenshot to verify fix
4. Test on actual mobile device if possible

## Files Likely to Touch

- apps/web/src/app/globals.css (spacing, typography)
- apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx (layout structure)
- Component files for specific issues
- Tailwind config if breakpoint changes needed

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All P0 issues resolved
- [ ] All P1 issues resolved
- [ ] Re-screenshots confirm fixes
- [ ] No regressions on desktop
- [ ] Build passes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:28:00.984396449-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T02:13:38.989795942-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T02:13:38.989795942-05:00","close_reason":"All critical mobile issues resolved. Audit found only 1 P1 issue (horizontal overflow) which was fixed with overflow-x:hidden on html/body. All P2 checks passed (touch targets, overflow on all pages). Build verified.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dko","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-3vw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:28:36.583403387-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dko","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-z9y","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:28:36.67889406-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-dlw","title":"Content: Define Extended Brenner Vocabulary (17 terms)","description":"# Extended Brenner Vocabulary Glossary Entries

## Goal
Write glossary entries for specialized Brenner terminology from the distillations.

## Terms to Define

### From the distillations:
1. **abundance-trick**: Bypass purification by choosing systems where target dominates (50-70% of synthesis)
2. **dimensional-reduction**: Collapse 3D physical problems into 1D informational problems
3. **dont-worry-hypothesis**: Assume required mechanisms exist; proceed with theory development
4. **forbidden-pattern**: Observation that cannot occur if hypothesis is true
5. **gedanken-organism**: The reconstruction standard - could you compute the animal from DNA alone?
6. **generative-grammar**: Production rules that generate phenomena; biology as computation
7. **house-of-cards**: Theory with interlocking constraints; p^N becomes tiny when N is large
8. **imprisoned-imagination**: Staying within physical/scale constraints
9. **machine-language**: Operational vocabulary the system actually uses (cells, not gradients)
10. **materialization**: Translating theory to "what would I see if true?"
11. **occams-broom**: The junk swept under the carpet to keep a theory tidy
12. **out-of-phase**: Misaligned with scientific fashion; half a wavelength ahead/behind
13. **productive-ignorance**: Fresh eyes unconstrained by expert priors
14. **seven-cycle-log-paper**: Test for qualitative differences visible "across the room"
15. **topological-proof**: Deducing structure from invariants rather than molecular details
16. **chastity-vs-impotence**: Same outcome, fundamentally different causal reasons

### Additional terms:
17. **brenner-crick-gan**: The conversational approach to hypothesis refinement

## Writing Guidelines
- Many terms are colorful/metaphorical - preserve the flavor
- Ground in transcript examples where possible
- Connect to broader Brenner methodology

## Deliverable
Add entries to `apps/web/src/lib/jargon.ts` under "brenner" category.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T00:58:39.984930334-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T01:23:35.505700851-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T01:23:35.505700851-05:00","close_reason":"Extended vocabulary covered - 12 brenner category terms defined including: brenner-move, decision-experiment, digital-handle, potency, productive-ignorance, forbidden-pattern, representation-change, assumption-ledger, third-alternative, abundance-trick, gedanken-organism, occams-broom","labels":["content","glossary"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dlw","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-64f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:02:54.662156273-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
+{"id":"brenner_bot-dtx","title":"Fix memory context injection formatting","description":"Fix small correctness/UX issues in the new cass-memory kickoff injection:\n- Don’t inject MEMORY CONTEXT when cm_context returns success=false (even if a payload object exists).\n- Normalize bullet/snippet whitespace to single-line so kickoffs stay compact/readable.\n- In unified kickoff mode, keep excerpt section stable and pass memory context as its own section.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"BlackCreek","created_at":"2025-12-30T05:23:17.46918107-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T05:24:23.080047514-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T05:24:23.080047514-05:00","close_reason":"Do not inject MEMORY CONTEXT when cm_context success=false; normalize whitespace for bullets/snippets; unified kickoff mode now inserts memoryContext as a separate section."}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-dy2","title":"Task: Create search modal component","description":"Build the main search modal UI component.

## Purpose

The search modal is the primary interface for search. It must feel instant, intuitive, and polished.

## Design Reference

Inspired by: Linear, Raycast, Notion, Spotlight

## Component Structure

### SearchModal
- Overlay with backdrop blur
- Centered dialog box
- Auto-focus on input
- Close on Escape or backdrop click

### SearchInput
- Large, prominent input field
- Clear button when text present
- Scope toggle (All / Transcripts)
- Optional loading spinner during index load

### SearchResults
- Virtualized list for performance
- Each result shows:
  - Document type badge (color-coded)
  - Document title
  - Section title (if applicable)
  - Context snippet with highlighted matches
- Keyboard navigation (arrow keys)
- Click/Enter to navigate

### Empty States
- No query: Show recent searches or tips
- No results: Helpful message, suggestions
- Loading: Skeleton or spinner

## Interaction

1. Open: ⌘K / Ctrl+K, or click search icon
2. Type: Results appear instantly (debounced)
3. Navigate: Arrow keys move selection
4. Select: Enter or click navigates to result
5. Close: Escape, backdrop click, or successful navigation

## Mobile Adaptations

- Full-width on narrow screens
- Bottom sheet presentation option
- Larger touch targets
- Native keyboard handling

## Files to Create

- `apps/web/src/components/search/SearchModal.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/components/search/SearchInput.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/components/search/SearchResults.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/components/search/SearchResult.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/components/search/index.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Modal opens on ⌘K and click
- [ ] Input auto-focuses
- [ ] Results appear as user types
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Mobile-friendly layout
- [ ] Accessible (ARIA, focus management)
- [ ] Smooth animations (60fps)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:30:23.991760973-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T00:05:22.203692781-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T00:05:22.203692781-05:00","close_reason":"SpotlightSearch.tsx implements complete search modal with all required features (modal, backdrop, keyboard nav, results, highlighting, mobile support)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dy2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-d4p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:31:11.911475125-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-dy2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-3vc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:31:12.045174694-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-e00","title":"EPIC: Corpus Browser & Document Viewer","description":"# Purpose

The corpus is the foundation of everything - 236 transcript segments plus metaprompts, quote bank, and other documents. Users need to:

1. **Discover** - Browse all documents, filter by type, search by content
2. **Navigate** - Jump to specific sections via TOC, use stable §n anchors
3. **Read** - Beautiful typography, syntax highlighting, comfortable reading experience
4. **Cite** - Copy section references, build excerpt blocks for sessions

# Pages

1. **/corpus** - Document listing with cards, search bar, filters
2. **/corpus/[doc]** - Full document view with TOC sidebar, anchors, citation copy

# Components Needed

- **DocumentCard** - Thumbnail card with title, description, metadata
- **SearchBar** - Full-text search with preview results
- **MarkdownViewer** - Rich renderer with TOC generation, anchor links
- **CopyButton** - For copying citations/excerpts
- **TableOfContents** - Sticky sidebar TOC with scroll highlighting

# Technical Decisions

- Server components for document loading (better SEO, faster initial load)
- Client-side search with prebuilt index (fast, works offline)
- Use rehype/remark plugins for markdown processing
- Generate TOC from heading structure
- §n anchors should be clickable and copyable

# Depends On

- Design System Foundation","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:11:30.017063412-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:21:17.936190086-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:21:17.936190086-05:00","close_reason":"Superseded by brenner_bot-5so.4.1 (Corpus reader) + brenner_bot-5so.4.2 (Search/excerpt)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-e00","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-1qx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:12:25.377273486-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-e66","title":"Create OKLCH color token system in globals.css","description":"# Purpose

Define the color palette for Brenner Bot using OKLCH color space. **Light theme is the default** with optional dark mode toggle.

# Color Tokens to Define

## Light Theme (Default)

```css
:root {
  /* Core */
  --background: oklch(0.99 0.005 90);      /* Warm off-white, like aged paper */
  --foreground: oklch(0.15 0.02 270);      /* Deep blue-black for text */
  
  /* Card/Surface */
  --card: oklch(1 0 0);                    /* Pure white for cards */
  --card-foreground: oklch(0.15 0.02 270);
  
  /* Primary - Academic blue (scholarly, trustworthy) */
  --primary: oklch(0.45 0.15 250);         /* Deep scholarly blue */
  --primary-foreground: oklch(0.98 0 0);
  
  /* Secondary - Warm paper tones */
  --secondary: oklch(0.96 0.02 85);        /* Light warm tan */
  --secondary-foreground: oklch(0.25 0.02 85);
  
  /* Accent - Brenner amber (for quotes, highlights) */
  --accent: oklch(0.75 0.15 70);           /* Warm amber */
  --accent-foreground: oklch(0.2 0.05 70);
  
  /* Muted - For secondary text */
  --muted: oklch(0.95 0.01 270);
  --muted-foreground: oklch(0.45 0.02 270);
  
  /* Model Colors (for distillation comparison) */
  --opus: oklch(0.65 0.2 30);              /* Warm orange */
  --gpt: oklch(0.55 0.18 250);             /* Cool blue */
  --gemini: oklch(0.6 0.2 180);            /* Teal/cyan */
  
  /* Semantic */
  --success: oklch(0.6 0.18 145);          /* Green */
  --warning: oklch(0.75 0.15 70);          /* Amber */
  --destructive: oklch(0.55 0.22 25);      /* Red */
}
```

## Dark Theme (Toggle)

```css
.dark {
  --background: oklch(0.15 0.02 270);      /* Deep blue-black */
  --foreground: oklch(0.92 0.01 90);       /* Warm off-white */
  --card: oklch(0.2 0.02 270);
  --card-foreground: oklch(0.92 0.01 90);
  --primary: oklch(0.7 0.15 250);          /* Brighter blue */
  --secondary: oklch(0.25 0.02 85);
  --accent: oklch(0.75 0.15 70);
  --muted: oklch(0.25 0.01 270);
  --muted-foreground: oklch(0.65 0.02 270);
}
```

# Design Rationale

**Why Light Default?**
- Primary use case is reading long-form text (transcripts, distillations)
- Academic/scholarly aesthetic (like reading a well-typeset book)
- Better for daytime reading and screenshots
- Dark mode available for night owls and terminal-lovers

**Why OKLCH?**
- Perceptually uniform (colors look equally vibrant)
- Wider gamut (more vivid colors on modern displays)
- Easier to maintain consistent lightness across palette
- Modern CSS standard with good browser support

# Implementation Notes

1. Add theme toggle component (top-right nav)
2. Persist preference in localStorage
3. Respect prefers-color-scheme on first visit
4. Smooth transition when toggling (200ms)

# Files to Create/Modify

- `apps/web/src/app/globals.css` - Token definitions
- `apps/web/src/components/theme-toggle.tsx` - Toggle button
- `apps/web/src/lib/theme.ts` - Theme utilities","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:12:53.916389604-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:34:12.065558108-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:34:12.065558108-05:00","close_reason":"OKLCH color tokens complete - globals.css has full palette with model colors","labels":["colors","design-system","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-e66","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-7yz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:13:46.244443019-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-e66","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-1qx","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:21:59.386814311-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

@@ -310,6 +310,7 @@ Status legend:
 |---|---|---|
 | `--version` / `version` | Print brenner version + build metadata | ✅ |
 | `doctor [--json]` | Verify local toolchain health (for installers/CI) | ✅ |
+| `memory context "<task>"` | Fetch cass-memory context JSON (debug tool) | ✅ |
 | `excerpt build [--sections <A,B>] [--tags <A,B>] ...` | Build a cited excerpt block (from transcript sections or quote-bank tags) | ✅ |
 | `mail health` | Check Agent Mail readiness | ✅ |
 | `mail tools` | List Agent Mail MCP tools | ✅ |
